title: Extreme heat puts pressure on electricity system with margin warning issued
snippet:
Heatwave has prompted NESO to issue a supply warning for tonight but it's confident there will be no blackouts

ai_summary: Heatwave-driven supply warnings from NESO indicate system stress conditions that may affect wholesale electricity prices and balancing mechanism activity, both relevant to tem's trading and customer hedging strategies.
